case_title: DANIEL SUH VS. MOTION MEDIA NETWORK INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUH, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MOTION MEDIA NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
